heading: Southwestern area sale at uniform systemwide rates of electric power over transmission lines constructed with appropriated funds or used under contractual arrangements
label: 825s–3 Southwestern area sale at uniform systemwide rates of electric power over transmission lines constructed with appropriated funds or used under contractual arrangements
text: Power and energy marketed by the Southwestern Power Administration pursuant to , shall be sold at uniform systemwide rates, without discrimination between customers to whom the Southwestern Power Administration delivers such power and energy by means of transmission lines or facilities constructed with appropriated funds, and customers to whom the Southwestern Power Administration delivers such power and energy by means of transmission lines or facilities, the use of which is acquired by lease, wheeling, or other contractual arrangements.section 825s of this title
notes: CodificationSection was not enacted as part of the Federal Power Act which generally comprises this chapter.

Effective Date, , , provided that:Pub. L. 95–456, § 292 Stat. 1230Oct. 13, 1978“This Act [enacting this section] shall not become effective until Contract No. 14–02–00001–1002, effective , between the United States of America and Associated Electric Cooperative, Inc., Springfield, Missouri, has been amended in a manner mutually agreeable to the parties thereto.”August 1, 1962
